welcome.title: Welcome to Velix VFS Automator
welcome.tagline: Enterprise-grade desktop assistant for scheduling VFS Global visa booking slots. Automatically scans VAC availability, manages candidate profiles, and notifies you when slots open up.

country_select.title: Target Country Selection
country_select.description: Choose one or more visa destination countries to automate. You can configure credentials and VAC preferences for each target in the next steps.
country_select.min_selection_alert: Please select at least one country to continue.

accounts.title: VFS Account Configuration
accounts.description: Set up portal credentials and visa types for each target country. You can add multiple applicant profiles per country.
accounts.no_applicants: At least one candidate profile must be added.
accounts.validation_error: Please fill in all email, password, and candidate fields correctly.

notifications.title: Alert Notifications Setup
notifications.description: Receive immediate updates when visa slots are discovered. Configure desktop pushes, audio alarms, or external Telegram webhooks.
notifications.desktop_desc: Displays instant system tray alerts when a slot is secured.
notifications.sound_desc: Plays a looping sound alarm when VFS slots are active.
notifications.telegram_desc: Send real-time alerts to a specific Telegram channel or chat.
notifications.test_success: Test alert successfully sent to Telegram API.
notifications.test_error: Connection failed. Please verify Bot Token and Chat ID parameters.

completion.title: Onboarding Complete!
completion.description: Velix VFS Automator is fully configured and ready for automation.
